characters.name: 600-Pound Skipping Chicken
characters.description: 600-Pound Skipping Chickenis a character fromBetween the Lions. He appears in theJustin Timesegmentof the same name, where he skips right towardsJustin, so Justin gets away on a pogo stick, and nearly falls off a cliff. Luckily, the chicken catches him and throws him back to his hammock.

characters.name: Announcer Bunny
characters.description: TheAnnouncer Bunnyis a major character inBetween the Lionsthat typically appears at the start of every episode fromSeason 1toSeason 4to provide a preview of the upcoming episode. He also acts as the announcer for various other segments, and introduces main recurring segments such asArty Smartypantsand Arty's stage nameThe Great Smartini,Fred Says(beginning inSeason 6) and theMonkey Cheerleaders. He also makes occasional appearances between segments, usually introducing the following segment. Starting inSeason 5, he pops up in the middle of every episode to introduce the next one, as well as announcing the show's funding credits.

characters.name: Arty Smartypants
characters.description: Arty Smartypantsis a bunraku puppet, who is also known as "The Great Smartini", who wears smarty pants. Although he has never visited the library, he occasionally would make appearances in the series. LikeMartha Reader, Arty has blue hair. He wears a yellow necktie with green diamonds, has two eyes (one swirly pattern, other regular), two ears, one big ear and a small ear, two arms made of popsicle sticks, two brown shoes, and checkered trousers he calls "Smarty Pants".

characters.name: Aunt Priscilla and Uncle Otto Lion
characters.description: Aunt Priscilla and Uncle Otto LionareLionelandLeona's aunt and uncle. In the episode "But, Mama, But...,"Cleoreceives word that Priscilla and Otto have just had three cubs. Cleo takes a trip to help out her relatives who have their paws full with the new cubs. Presumably, Aunt Priscilla is Cleo's sister and Uncle Otto is Cleo's brother-in-law. The three new cubs would be the maternal cousins of Leona and Lionel. Aunt Priscilla and Uncle Otto are only mentioned, but are never seen onscreen.

characters.name: B.B. the King of Beasts
characters.description: B.B. the King of BeastsisTheo'sblues-singing and guitar-playing alter ego. He is based on the late legendary blues singer B.B. King (AKA Riley B. King). In B.B.'s musical numbers, he is seen in full-body puppet form, complete with legs, unlike the standard waist-up Theo puppet.

characters.name: Barnaby B. Busterfield III
characters.description: Don't call me Buster! Barnaby B. Busterfield, also known (much to his own dismay) as"Buster", is the founder ofBusterfield Libraryand its eponym. On theBetween the LionsTV series, Busterfield exists as a bust of a man with a curled mustache. He is generally annoyed by the antics ofWalter and Clay Pigeonbut he can't do anything to avoid them because, being a statue, especially without legs, he cannot go anywhere. He never seems to relocate from his perch in the library. He also has the ability to open the top of his head. He is performed byTim Lagasse, who also playsArty Smartypants, and eventhe library itself.

characters.name: Big Bird
characters.description: Big Bird is an 8'2" yellow bird who lives onSesame Street. InEpisode 52: Tweet! Tweet!, Big Bird made one cameo appearance saying "Tweet! Tweet!". From 1969 to 2018, He was performed by the lateCaroll Spinney. As of 2018, he is performed byMatt Vogel.

characters.name: Bijoy
characters.description: Bijoyis a character who appeared inStolen Smells. He appears in the story "Stolen Smells". One day, he smells the sweets inKoyel's shop, but doesn't come in to buy anything, which Koyel is not happy about. So Koyel tries to get him to pay for the smells, which he thinks is a joke. When Koyel calls the police, they are both brought into court. The Judge decides that Bijoy should pay Koyel for the smells, so he pays the Judge. But then the Judge tells Koyel that in exchange for the sweets she shall receive the sound of money, and she gives the coins back to Bijoy. To this day, Bijoy still smells Koyel's sweets, which he pays for with the sound of money.
